flavour.description: Detected or configured project language/framework (e.g. go, rust, node, bun, python, csharp)

project_intent.description: Description of the project's purpose derived from user input, README, or design docs

existing_files.description: List of files already present in the project directory

files_to_create.description: Recommended files to scaffold for this flavour

build_system.description: Recommended build system (e.g. cargo, go, npm, bun, pip, dotnet)

ci_provider.description: CI provider to generate config for (e.g. github-actions)

language.description: Value of project.language from wave.yaml if set

build_command.description: Value of project.build_command from wave.yaml if set

test_command.description: Value of project.test_command from wave.yaml if set
